macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Major Indexes Decline Sharply Amid High Volatility
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 1.33% to 6,740, Dow Jones dropped 0.95% to 47,501.55, and Nasdaq Composite declined 1.59% as of March 6 close. Energy sector hit all-time highs with Marathon Petroleum and Valero Energy leading, while Basic Materials fell 7.1%.[1][3]

items.title: Standout Stock Performers Defy Market Downturn
items.summary: Mobix Labs surged 530.3% and Turbo Energy +459.6%, with CF Industries up 16.3% to a one-year high. X3 Holdings plunged 97.2% amid broad declines.[1]

items.title: Upcoming High-Stakes Earnings for Key Stocks
items.summary: Stocks like Oracle (ORCL, 11.74% implied move on March 10), Adobe (ADBE on March 12), and others set for significant post-earnings volatility. VIX spiked above 28 on March 3 but declined, triggering buy signals.[2]

items.title: US Consumer Confidence Inches Up in February
items.summary: Conference Board Consumer Confidence Index rose 2.2 points to 91.2, with Expectations Index up 4.8 to 72.0, though still below late 2024 peaks. Inflation expectations remained elevated, with most expecting higher stock prices in 12 months.[5]

items.title: Dow Jones Recent Historical Data Shows Volatility
items.summary: Dow closed at 47,501.55 on March 6 after dropping from 47,954.74 on March 5, amid fluctuating sessions earlier in the week.[4]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Treasury Company Buys $4.3B in BTC in Early 2026, Altering Bear Market Structure
items.summary: Chaitanya Jain of Bitcoin Treasury Company revealed the firm acquired 48,000 bitcoins for $4.3 billion in the first two months of 2026, following 8,000 BTC for $300 million in 2022. This institutional buying, alongside STRC and MSTR, is said to create the 'ultimate Bitcoin accumulation machine,' permanently changing the Bitcoin bear market structure.

items.title: US Federal Judge Allows Binance Terrorism Lawsuit Plaintiffs to Refile Within 60 Days
items.summary: A U.S. federal judge has permitted plaintiffs in a terrorism-related lawsuit against Binance to refile their case within 60 days. This regulatory development highlights ongoing legal challenges for the exchange.

items.title: Stablecoin Transfer Volume Hits Record $1.8 Trillion in February
items.summary: Data shows stablecoin transfers reached a historical high of $1.8 trillion in February, with USDC growth accelerating faster than USDT. This surge underscores expanding cryptocurrency payment infrastructure, which exceeded $1 billion in Q1 financing for the first time.

items.title: Major On-Chain Liquidation: Address Loses $4.48M Liquidating 115.6 WBTC
items.summary: An on-chain address liquidated 115.6 WBTC, resulting in a $4.48 million loss. This event reflects volatility amid recent market movements.

items.title: AI-Driven Crypto Investment Scams Surge Using Fake CEO Videos on YouTube
items.summary: Scammers are leveraging AI to create realistic YouTube videos featuring fake CEOs promoting cryptocurrency investments, targeting uninformed investors. The SEC warns of risks in crypto investments lacking full understanding.

items.title: Michael Saylor Discusses Bitcoin Crash and MSTR Stock Drop in Keynote
items.summary: Michael Saylor addressed the recent Bitcoin crash and MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock decline, advocating for corporate Bitcoin adoption as a treasury asset to weather market volatility. The talk emphasizes strategic moves in the evolving monetary landscape.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Large AI Models Accelerate Catalyst Discovery by Predicting Performance Pre-Synthesis
items.summary: Researchers demonstrate how large AI models, combined with high-quality catalysis databases and machine learning interatomic potentials, enable rapid prediction of catalyst performance before synthesis, potentially revolutionizing materials science for fuel cells and hydrogen production.

items.title: AI Uncovers Hidden Raman Signal for Liquid-Like Ion Flow in Solid-State Batteries
items.summary: A new machine learning pipeline predicts Raman spectra to identify low-frequency signals indicating liquid-like ion motion in solid crystals, speeding up discovery of superionic materials for safer, higher-energy-density batteries.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
